summary: First-iteration full testing of the Labs MVP (backend + Expo web frontend). All 18 backend pytest tests passed against the public preview URL. Full mobile UI happy-path validated: onboarding (4 steps) → Today → Biomarkers (all 4 chips + overlay toggle) → Trends (2w/6w/3m) → Invie (boot insight + chat reply) → Vault (sovereignty, 3 sources, export). All testIDs from the agent_to_agent_context_note are present and working. No deprecated Expo packages detected. No red screens or page errors. Minor cosmetic note: the Invie chat input bar overlaps the bottom-tab labels (~4px) on a 390-wide viewport.

ui_bugs.issue: Floating input is positioned just above the bottom tab bar and visually overlaps the tab labels (TODAY/etc.) by a few pixels on a 390-wide viewport. Functional but reduces tab-label legibility.

action_items: (Optional, LOW) Add bottom padding/safe-area to Invie input container so it sits above the bottom-tab labels without overlap.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event hooks — works fine on current FastAPI but should migrate to lifespan context manager when convenient.
Frontend correctly uses process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL; no hardcoded URLs found.
All MongoDB reads exclude _id via projection — no ObjectId leakage.
seed_data_creation: None — backend auto-seeds the Léa Moreau demo dataset on startup (70 days, ~32 biomarker readings). Onboarding test temporarily renamed athlete to TEST_Athlete then restored to Léa Moreau in teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite lives at /app/backend/tests/test_labs_api.py. Run with: EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=<public_url> pytest backend/tests/ -v. Onboarding test mutates the demo athlete name and restores it in teardown_method. Frontend onboarding gate uses localStorage key 'labs.onboarded' — clear it to re-test onboarding. Bottom-tab labels: today/biomarkers/trends/invie/vault are matched by visible text labels, while interactive cards use the listed testIDs.
